title: oxystelma esculentum
intro: Oxystelma esculentum, also known as the desert morels or mountain morels, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly found in Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as oxystelmine. Oxystelma esculentum is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a tonic to promote overall well-being. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
